rpathviz 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Plotting

Interactive plots for Rsim

Source: R/rsimplot_rpathviz.R
rsimplot_rpathviz.Rd

Interactive plots for Rsim plot using plotly:: package and tidyverse::

add another paragraph

Usage

rsimplot_rpathviz(
  Rsim.output,
  spname = "all",
  indplot = FALSE,
  palette = "rainbow"
)

Arguments

Rsim.output

An object of class Rsim

spname

A character vector of species names to plot

indplot

Logical value of whether to plot a single group or multiple groups

palette

A character vector of colors to use

Value

An interactive plotly object

Contributors

rsim.plot function from Rpath by Kerim Aydin

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# create the Rsim object
library(Rpath)
runObj <- rsim.scenario(rpath(REco.params), REco.params, years= 1:50)
Rsim.output <- rsim.run(runObj, years= 1:50)
# plot the Rsim object
rsimplot_rpathviz(Rsim.output)

} # }
